description: Sarcastic customer reporting a water leak; resolved with a batch-defect replacement. Based on conv_eb684d18.

messages.body: Oh wonderful, another night of my premium sleep system turning my bed into a swimming pool. Really living the luxury lifestyle here. The $2,500 nightstand decoration has decided water features are the hot new bedroom trend. I'm sure this is a 'feature' right?
I'm so sorry about the water leak. Let me check with our hardware team right away.
I've already done all basic troubleshooting. Please don't ask me to restart the hub again.
I've checked with our hardware team and they've confirmed this is a known issue with a specific batch. We'll be sending you a replacement.
I'm really disappointed. Expected better for the price I paid.
